headline: 3 Financials Stocks We’re Skeptical Of
summary: Financial firms serve as the backbone of the economy, providing essential services from lending and investment management to risk management and payment processing. But worries about economic uncertainty and potential market volatility have kept sentiment in check, and over the past six months, the industry has tumbled by 2.7%. This drop is a far cry from the S&P 500’s 10% ascent.
